race.comment: UNITED LEGEND (1) did well to score at Murray Bridge two runs ago. Fair effort last time out when third at Morphettville Parks when doing his best work late. This doesn't look as hard so he can return to the winners' list. BUSH INFERENCE (6) turned in a decent effort last start to finish third over 2200m at Balaklava after being prominent at the turn. Likely improver with strong prospects. RIKKI RIKKARDO (5) ran a better race last start, finishing fourth over the mile here. Better placed out to this trip and is among the chances. BLUE ISLES (10) has peaks that measure up and is one to keep in mind.
